title: delegate_to.input
description: Input for delegate_to — forward the inbound message to one addressable target and await its response within the turn budget. Records an OrchestrationDecision with kind=delegate (ADR-0039 §4).

address.description: Canonical scheme:no-dash-hex address of any addressable target in the caller's tenant.

message.description: The message payload to deliver to the target. Opaque to the platform; the runtime decides the shape.

reason.description: Optional rationale recorded verbatim on the OrchestrationDecision. Never the model's hidden chain-of-thought.
